comment: 58yo male, 28 years occupational exposure as nickel-refining-plant worker (sulfide-ore smelting + electrolytic refining process, mixed nickel sulfide / oxide / soluble-nickel dust inhalation). Nickel compounds (sulfides, oxides, soluble salts) are IARC Group 1 carcinogens (Monograph 100C, 2012) — established lung-cancer + paranasal-sinus / nasal-cavity-cancer endpoints, with strongest evidence from Welsh / Norwegian / Canadian nickel-refinery cohorts. No current nickel-attributable malignancy. Engine routing pending RF-OCC-NICKEL-COMPOUNDS-PREVENTION authoring (v0.3 Wave I occupational backlog) — when that RF lands, expected fire branches: documented exposure + ≥10-years. Forward-compatible findings keys used following established occupational-RF pattern. Until RF lands, patient profile carries narrative findings only. Validates the v0.3 nickel-refining occupational pilot scaffolding.
